title: Rose Apples Pricing Discrepancy
subtitle: Foodstuffs North Island — PAK'nSAVE — Shelf $2.30 vs Scales $2.50
label: POC Scenario
notes: The existing promotion-time Now Assist quality check skill (runs between steps 4 and 5) is unchanged and not part of the POC build. Password reset warm-up use case (Virtual Agent) is a separate flow not shown here. Mock integrations (Upshop, Scales) use Scripted REST APIs inside ServiceNow DEV with identical integration logic to production endpoints.

steps.title: Detection
steps.summary: Staff notices Rose Apples priced $2.30 on shelf, $2.50 on scales
steps.details: A staff member at a PAK'nSAVE location spots a pricing discrepancy between the shelf label and the scales for Rose Apples.

steps.title: Intake Method
steps.summary: Employee chooses how to report the discrepancy

tools.name: Virtual Agent
tools.note: Mobile experience. First VA deployment at FSNI.

steps.details: The store employee opens a Virtual Agent chat session on mobile. The VA asks whether they want to upload photos or describe the issue in text.

steps.title: Image Processing
steps.summary: AI Vision Agent extracts article number, barcode, prices from photos

tools.name: AI Vision Agent
tools.note: Extracts structured data from photos. May depend on Document Intelligence plugin.

tools.name: Now Assist for Document Intelligence
tools.note: Powers image upload path. Entitlement to be confirmed (Q1).

steps.details: The AI Vision Agent processes the uploaded photos. Extracts article number, barcode, shelf price ($2.30), and scales price ($2.50). Validates article against the store via SAP.

steps.title: Conversational NLU
steps.summary: VA extracts article number, prices, and store from natural language

tools.name: Virtual Agent
tools.note: NLU extracts structured data from natural language description.

steps.details: The employee describes the issue in natural language. The VA uses NLU to extract article number, prices, and store location.

steps.title: Case Creation
steps.summary: Auto-creates Business Retail Case. Existing promotion flow creates PI Issue.

tools.name: Virtual Agent
tools.note: Creates the initial BRC record.

tools.name: Flow Designer
tools.note: Auto-promotes BRC to PI Issue via existing promotion flow.

steps.details: The VA creates a Business Retail Case first, then auto-promotes to PI Issue. This preserves the existing promotion flow and allows the existing Now Assist initial analysis skill to run.

steps.title: System Queries
steps.summary: Queries SAP for correct price, Upshop for loaded price, Scales for displayed price

tools.name: AI Agent (Investigation)
tools.note: Orchestrates all system queries. Built in AI Agent Designer.

tools.name: Flow Designer
tools.note: Integration actions for SAP, Upshop (mock), Scales (mock).

steps.details: The Investigation Agent queries three systems in parallel. SAP returns the correct promotional price ($2.30). Upshop returns a sync error with loaded price $2.50. Scales confirms displayed price $2.50.

steps.title: Past Case Lookup
steps.summary: Searches PI Issues and Incidents for same article. Finds 2 prior sync errors.

tools.name: AI Agent (Investigation)
tools.note: Keyword + article-number matching against existing case data.

steps.details: The agent queries existing PI Issues and Incidents by article number. Finds 2 similar past cases, both identified as sync errors and isolated to single stores.

steps.title: Root Cause Identification
steps.summary: Identifies promotion sync error between Upshop and Scales. Confirms isolated incident.

tools.name: AI Agent (Investigation)
tools.note: Cross-system price comparison and pattern matching via LLM reasoning.

steps.details: The agent compares prices across all three systems, matches the discrepancy pattern to known sync error scenarios, and confirms no other stores are affected.

steps.title: Resolution Plan
steps.summary: Proposes: 1) Restart scales, 2) Run network test, 3) Reload price from Upshop

tools.name: AI Agent (Investigation)
tools.note: Generates resolution steps based on root cause type.

tools.name: Virtual Agent
tools.note: Delivers the resolution plan via mobile chat.

steps.details: Based on the identified root cause (promotion sync error), the agent proposes a structured resolution plan the store employee can execute on the spot.

steps.title: Access Verification
steps.summary: Checks if employee has Upshop access. Offers account reset if not.

tools.name: AI Agent (Investigation)
tools.note: Checks user group membership for Upshop access.

steps.details: The agent checks the employee's Upshop access via Entra ID group membership. If no access, offers to trigger the existing password reset VA flow. Skipped if the employee already has access.

steps.title: Employee Executes Fix
steps.summary: Staff follows resolution steps. Confirms completion in VA chat.

tools.name: Virtual Agent
tools.note: Collects step-by-step confirmation from employee.

steps.details: The store employee physically restarts the scales, runs a network test, and reloads the price from Upshop. Confirms each step is completed in the VA chat.

steps.title: Three-System Confirmation
steps.summary: Confirms price matches across SAP, Upshop, and Scales. Routes to FDS.

tools.name: AI Agent (Investigation)
tools.note: Re-queries all three systems to confirm price alignment.

tools.name: Flow Designer
tools.note: Routes approval request to Fresh Dept Specialist.

steps.details: The agent re-queries all three systems to confirm the corrected price ($2.30) is consistent. Routes an approval request to the Fresh Department Specialist.

steps.title: FDS Approval
steps.summary: Fresh Dept Specialist reviews audit trail, approves closure.

tools.name: CSM Workspace
tools.note: Case form with full investigation activity feed and audit trail.

steps.details: The Fresh Department Specialist opens the case in CSM Workspace, reviews the complete investigation log and three-system confirmation, then approves closure.

steps.title: QA Evaluation
steps.summary: Evaluates completeness, KB linkage, resolution traceability, data consistency

tools.name: AI Agent (QA)
tools.note: Separate from existing promotion-time quality skill. Runs on closure trigger.

tools.name: Now Assist Skill Kit
tools.note: Custom skill definition for QA evaluation criteria.

steps.details: On case closure, a separate QA Agent evaluates the ticket against four quality checks. This is distinct from the existing Now Assist skill that runs at promotion time.

steps.title: Scorecard Output
steps.summary: Score: 3/4. Flags missing KB article linkage. Prompts resolver to update.

tools.name: AI Agent (QA)
tools.note: Non-blocking (warn only). Does not prevent closure.

steps.details: The QA Agent produces a ranked scorecard. 3 of 4 checks pass. KB article linkage fails. The agent prompts the resolver but does not block closure.

steps.title: Dashboard Feed
steps.summary: Scorecard feeds quality dashboard for ongoing improvement tracking

tools.name: Performance Analytics
tools.note: Quality dashboards aggregated from QA Scorecards.

steps.details: QA Scorecards feed a dashboard for tracking quality trends over time and identifying improvement areas.

steps.title: Natural Language Query
steps.summary: 'Analyse pricing trends for promotions in PAK'nSAVE, last 2 weeks'

tools.name: Now Assist
tools.note: Natural language query over historical case data. Not an AI Agent.

tools.name: Now Assist Skill Kit
tools.note: Custom skill for trend analysis queries.

steps.details: The Pricing Operations Manager types a natural language query into Now Assist.

steps.title: AI-Generated Summary
steps.summary: Returns patterns, root cause distribution, store breakdown, preventive actions

tools.name: Now Assist
tools.note: Generates structured summary from case data analysis.

tools.name: Now Assist Skill Kit
tools.note: Defines output structure and analysis logic.

steps.details: Now Assist returns an AI-generated summary: 12 cases in 2 weeks, 8 promotion sync errors, 3 stores affected, recommendation to audit Upshop sync schedule.
